'''√p-zh-d''' ('''pazhada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrolocate|electrolocate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrolocate|electrolocate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-zh-d
|-
! Lemma
| pazhada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazhadithi|pazhadithi]] || [[word:pazhadiji|pazhadiji]] || [[word:pazhadishi|pazhadishi]] || [[word:pazhadi|pazhadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhaduthuth|pazhaduthuth]] || [[word:pazhadujuj|pazhadujuj]] || [[word:pazhadushush|pazhadushush]] || [[word:pazhad|pazhad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhaduthu|pazhaduthu]] || [[word:pazhaduju|pazhaduju]] || [[word:pazhadushu|pazhadushu]] || [[word:pazhadu|pazhadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhadufuth|pazhadufuth]] || [[word:pazhadufuj|pazhadufuj]] || [[word:pazhadufush|pazhadufush]] || [[word:pazhaduf|pazhaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazhadethe|pazhadethe]] || [[word:pazhadeje|pazhadeje]] || [[word:pazhadeshe|pazhadeshe]] || [[word:pazhade|pazhade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhadothoth|pazhadothoth]] || [[word:pazhadojoj|pazhadojoj]] || [[word:pazhadoshosh|pazhadoshosh]] || [[word:pazhad|pazhad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhadotho|pazhadotho]] || [[word:pazhadojo|pazhadojo]] || [[word:pazhadosho|pazhadosho]] || [[word:pazhado|pazhado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhadofoth|pazhadofoth]] || [[word:pazhadofoj|pazhadofoj]] || [[word:pazhadofosh|pazhadofosh]] || [[word:pazhadof|pazhadof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhadïfïf|pazhadïfïf]] || [[word:pazhadïfïf|pazhadïfïf]] || [[word:pazhadïfïf|pazhadïfïf]] || [[word:pazhadïfïf|pazhadïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]] || [[word:pazhadïf|pazhadïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pazhadæthæ|pazhadæthæ]] || [[word:pazhadæjæ|pazhadæjæ]] || [[word:pazhadæshæ|pazhadæshæ]] || [[word:pazhadæ|pazhadæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhadathath|pazhadathath]] || [[word:pazhadajaj|pazhadajaj]] || [[word:pazhadashash|pazhadashash]] || [[word:pazhad|pazhad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhadatha|pazhadatha]] || [[word:pazhadaja|pazhadaja]] || [[word:pazhadasha|pazhadasha]] || [[word:pazhada|pazhada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhadafath|pazhadafath]] || [[word:pazhadafaj|pazhadafaj]] || [[word:pazhadafash|pazhadafash]] || [[word:pazhadaf|pazhadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pazhadasha|pazhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopazhadasha|gopazhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipazhadasha|gokipazhadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pazhadnüsha|pazhadnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopazhadnknüsha|gopazhadnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipazhadnüsha|gokipazhadnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pazhadshësha|pazhadshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopazhadnkshësha|gopazhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipazhadshësha|gokipazhadshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazhadrosha|pazhadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazhadnkrosha|gopazhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazhadrosha|gokipazhadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhadmusha|pazhadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazhadnkmusha|gopazhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhadmusha|gokipazhadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pazhadsherasha|pazhadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopazhadnksherasha|gopazhadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipazhadsherasha|gokipazhadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pazhadngasha|pazhadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopazhadnkngasha|gopazhadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipazhadngasha|gokipazhadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pazhadyasha|pazhadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopazhadnkyasha|gopazhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipazhadyasha|gokipazhadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pazhadyamasha|pazhadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopazhadnkyamasha|gopazhadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipazhadyamasha|gokipazhadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pazhadnüshësha|pazhadnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopazhadnknüshësha|gopazhadnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipazhadnüshësha|gokipazhadnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazhadnürosha|pazhadnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazhadnknürosha|gopazhadnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazhadnürosha|gokipazhadnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhadnümusha|pazhadnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazhadnknümusha|gopazhadnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhadnümusha|gokipazhadnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pazhadshënüsha|pazhadshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopazhadnkshënüsha|gopazhadnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipazhadshënüsha|gokipazhadshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazhadshërosha|pazhadshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazhadnkshërosha|gopazhadnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazhadshërosha|gokipazhadshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhadshëmusha|pazhadshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazhadnkshëmusha|gopazhadnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhadshëmusha|gokipazhadshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pazhadronüsha|pazhadronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopazhadnkronüsha|gopazhadnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipazhadronüsha|gokipazhadronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pazhadroshësha|pazhadroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopazhadnkroshësha|gopazhadnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipazhadroshësha|gokipazhadroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazhadromusha|pazhadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazhadnkromusha|gopazhadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazhadromusha|gokipazhadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pazhadmunüsha|pazhadmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopazhadnkmunüsha|gopazhadnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipazhadmunüsha|gokipazhadmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pazhadmushësha|pazhadmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopazhadnkmushësha|gopazhadnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipazhadmushësha|gokipazhadmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pazhadmurosha|pazhadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopazhadnkmurosha|gopazhadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipazhadmurosha|gokipazhadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pazhad|pazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pæzhæd|pæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopazhad|hopazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopæzhæd|hopæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopazhad|hohopazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopæzhæd|hohopæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüpazhad|nüpazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüpæzhæd|nüpæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüpazhad|nünüpazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüpæzhæd|nünüpæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïpazhad|nïpazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïpæzhæd|nïpæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïpazhad|nïnïpazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïpæzhæd|nïnïpæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupazhad|lupazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupæzhæd|lupæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupazhad|lulupazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupæzhæd|lulupæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipazhad|lipazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipæzhæd|lipæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipazhad|lilipazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipæzhæd|lilipæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopazhad|kopazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopæzhæd|kopæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopazhad|kokopazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopæzhæd|kokopæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepazhad|kepazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepæzhæd|kepæzhæd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepazhad|kekepazhad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepæzhæd|kekepæzhæd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
